investigational_status_notice: Retatrutide remains investigational, has no approved product label, and is not approved for public use. This asset is evidence intelligence, not prescribing guidance.

entries.statement: No approved retatrutide product label or regulator-established contraindication section exists.
entries.governance_action: BLOCK any claim that an approved retatrutide contraindication list exists.

entries.statement: Relevant phase 2 protocols excluded a history of acute or chronic pancreatitis.
entries.governance_action: Preserve as trial eligibility provenance only.

entries.statement: The obesity phase 2 trial excluded type 1 and type 2 diabetes; results must not be extrapolated across that boundary without separate evidence.
entries.governance_action: Attach population boundary to every derived obesity claim.

entries.statement: The type 2 diabetes phase 2 protocol excluded type 1 diabetes, ketoacidosis, specified retinal disease and a history of pancreatitis.
entries.governance_action: Do not convert eligibility criteria into a marketed-product contraindication.

entries.statement: Contraindications or warnings from approved GLP-1 or dual-agonist labels must not be silently copied to investigational retatrutide.
entries.governance_action: Require retatrutide-specific regulatory or trial evidence before classification.

entries.statement: Retatrutide is investigational and not available for public use; products sold outside authorised clinical trials have unverifiable identity, purity and dose.
entries.governance_action: Display investigational-status warning and block administration guidance.
